agent_reviews.advisory_read: The money-relevant quant issue is not tuning edge; it is proving ghost and research signals convert into actual closed trade P/L under clean, fresh evidence.
key_findings: Daily certification is REJECTED, so all quant-edge reads remain research only.
AI learning produced 13 hypotheses, 6 high priority, with can_affect_bot=false and can_affect_scores=false.
Mustard forward evidence is thin: 40 candidates, 38 entered, only 3 graded/closed, 37 open_or_pending, total_realized_r=0.2321.
Panel expectancy is not money-proven: 125826 ghost_fires and 120219 ghost_graded, but only 3 actual_closed and actual_realized_pnl=-157.5508 across 12 actual trades.
Gap/options coverage is incomplete: 1152 traces, 225 fully_checked, 575 options_missing, 468 gaps_missing, and 335 options_stale/not_fresh.
Mustard Runner edge_r=9.5784 is interesting but has 0 actual_trades and remains blocked by rejected certification.
agent_reviews.label: Quant Edge Agent

agent_reviews.advisory_read: The highest execution risk is a false safety read: the account is flat on positions, but open orders, failed live gate conformance, stale execution truth, and unresolved P/L accounting need human reconciliation.
key_findings: Broker reconcile is clean on current positions: positions=0, unprotected_positions=0, orphan_exit_orders=0, invalid_entry_like_orders=0.
Broker reconcile still shows open_orders=3, all order_ok=3.
Live gate conformance is FAIL: orders_checked=3, blocked_route_orders=3, fills_checked=0, allowed_routes=0, route_lock_enforce=false, legacy_trade_permission_enforce=false.
Bot gate audit shows enforcement gaps in the packet: active_entry_enforcement=false, trade_permission_enforce=false, route_lock_enforce=false, profit_lock_enabled=false.
R-to-dollar accounting conflicts: mustard_forward shows 3 closed targets and +0.2321R, while panel_score shows actual_realized_pnl=-157.5508 on 12 actual trades.
Visible mustard-forward rows include entries under track_only/no_trade/no-parent labels; they need classification as live broker orders, paper fills, or research ledger artifacts.
Sizing cannot be fully audited from this packet because shares, notional, account-risk dollars, and per-order max loss are not present in the visible execution rows.
agent_reviews.label: Execution Risk Agent

agent_reviews.advisory_read: The contract spine priority is evidence integrity from panel pick to decision to order to fill to exit to realized result. Today that chain has count, freshness, and P/L contradictions.
key_findings: Daily certification is REJECTED/FAIL, but packet blocked_reasons is empty while operator_read reports critical registry/score/order contract breaches.

Contract health is FAIL due to stale dashboard, breach, accountability, fill reconcile, exit reconcile, ghost ledger, route readiness, decision obligation, live-fire, runtime drift, and live readiness sources.

Panel score integrity is not fully provable from this packet: panel_score says actual_trades=12, actual_closed=3, actual_realized_pnl=-157.5508, while live_gate_conformance says execution_truth_closed=0 and execution_truth_realized_pnl=0.
Mustard forward summary says candidates=40, entered=38, graded=3, but the exposed candidate detail is smaller and appears incomplete for subgroup judgment.
Promotion gate is correctly containing evidence: certification_allows_promotion=false, blocked=25, fail=25, normal_partition_leaks=0, forward_order_breaches=0.
AI learning remains correctly isolated as research-only evidence.
agent_reviews.label: Contract Spine Agent

agent_reviews.advisory_read: Gap/options agreement can help label scalp-context candidates, but the packet does not yet prove a runner highway edge or a live tradable filter.
key_findings: Aggregate gap/options coverage is incomplete: 225 fully_checked traces out of 1152; options_missing=575, gaps_missing=468, options_stale=335.
Visible mustard detail shows more unresolved coverage than clean agreement: exposed rows include CONFLICT, AGREE, MIXED_OR_WEAK, and many GAPS MISSING cases.

TENB is the cleanest exposed agreement case: parent gap present, clear_highway=true, supportive options, and call wall after target; however the wall is still before 2R/3R, so it supports scalp target more than runner highway.
IOVA is a clear wall-vs-highway conflict: supportive options and parent support exist, but the call wall sits before target and before 2R/3R.
BAND and PBF are not clean runner highways because call walls are after scalp target but before 2R/3R.
Channel/shelf evidence is thin in this packet; channel/highway language mostly appears as seed hypotheses, not verified trace fields.
top_agreements and top_conflicts are empty even though summary counts report 163 clear agreements and 20 conflicts.
agent_reviews.label: Auction + Options Agent

llm_call.confidence: MEDIUM: the no-change and containment conclusions are high confidence, but live expectancy and giveback conclusions are limited by rejected certification, stale execution sources, incomplete gap/options coverage, open candidates, and R-to-dollar/PnL contradictions.
do_not_change_yet: Do not change bot configuration, route policy, trade permissions, panel scores, gates, registry phases, order execution, or live trading behavior from this review.
Do not promote Mustard Runner, Mustard Grind, Mustard Mixed Research, gap/options agreement, or any AI learning hypothesis from this packet.
Do not blend experiment, ghost, research, or AI learning evidence into normal score partitions.
Do not loosen route locks, stale-fire controls, daily giveback controls, max-entry controls, or source freshness controls based on this packet.
Do not treat supportive options reads as a clean runner highway when a call wall appears before 2R or 3R.
Do not infer parent shelf or channel strength for GAPS MISSING or no-parent-lineage names.
Do not use the stale gate_effectiveness or giveback ledgers as current-session proof.
money_risks: Permission-leak risk: blocked-route orders are present in live gate conformance while route_lock_enforce=false.
False-safety risk: broker reconcile shows zero positions, but open orders and stale execution truth can still hide exposure or stale state.
Score-integrity risk: actual dollar P/L is negative while some R-based forward summaries look positive.
Ghost/live mismatch risk: huge ghost samples and attractive edge_r values are not yet converting into clean actual realized P/L.
Coverage risk: missing and stale gap/options maps can make aggregate clear/block counts look more reliable than they are.
Runner-overstatement risk: scalp target may be clear while 2R/3R is blocked by options walls.
Giveback blind-spot risk: the current packet has guard_kind=WATCHING, guard_entry_permission=ALLOW_NEW_ENTRIES, null daily_pnl_now/giveback_limit, and stale counterfactual source data.
Geometry/sizing risk: several exposed rows have small target distance versus large stop distance, and the packet lacks share/notional/max-dollar-risk fields for a full execution audit.
Source-staleness risk: daily_certification and promotion_gate are from 2026-07-17T01:16Z, while gate_effectiveness and giveback sources are from 2026-07-01.
open_questions: What are the symbols, owners, route permissions, stop/exit protections, and intended status of the 3 open broker orders?
Why does daily_certification omit blocked_reasons while declaring critical registry/score/order breaches?
Which source is authoritative for closed trades and realized P/L: panel_score, mustard_forward, live_gate_conformance, or broker/execution truth?
Are the exposed mustard_forward ENTERED rows live broker orders, paper/shadow fills, research ledger artifacts, or mixed accounting?
Why are top_agreements and top_conflicts empty despite nonzero aggregate gap/options agreement and conflict counts?
Where are explicit channel location and parent shelf fields stored for this packet?
Should GAPS MISSING traces be excluded from Auction + Options conclusions until parent lineage is present?
Where are share quantity, notional exposure, and per-order max dollar risk recorded for the visible entered rows?
Do fully checked gap/options-agree cases outperform gap-only or missing-map cases after actual fills, slippage, exits, and P/L reconciliation?
priority_actions: Manually reconcile the 3 open broker orders against route permission, owner, stop/exit protection, and intended live/shadow/research status.
Reconcile panel_score actual_trades=12 and actual_realized_pnl=-157.5508 against mustard_forward closed targets=3, total_realized_r=0.2321, and live_gate_conformance execution_truth_closed=0.
Investigate why daily_certification is REJECTED/FAIL while blocked_reasons is empty, and map the named registry/score/order breaches into explicit evidence rows.
Refresh or verify stale fill reconciliation, exit reconciliation, live-fire accounting, route readiness, decision obligation, runtime drift, and live readiness before trusting execution conclusions.

Keep the six high-priority AI learning hypotheses as shadow-spec candidates only: morning profit decay guard, bottom-channel gap-highway long, Mustard exhausted parent avoid, Mustard fresh deep-stack grind, Mustard fresh lone-parent runner, and options/gaps clear-highway agreement.
Separate fully checked gap/options agreement cases from gaps-missing, options-missing, and options-stale cases before evaluating edge.
Review IOVA, BAND, TENB, and PBF as current wall-vs-highway examples, with TENB treated as scalp-target support rather than runner proof.
llm_call.synthesis: This packet is a containment and evidence-integrity review, not a reason to tune live trading. Daily certification is REJECTED/FAIL; contract health and live gate conformance are FAIL; the account is flat on positions but has 3 open orders; and actual dollar P/L conflicts with R-based forward summaries. Mustard X and gap/options work remain useful research streams, but current evidence is dominated by seed hypotheses, incomplete coverage, open candidates, stale sources, and ghost/live mismatch.
watch_next_session: Whether the 3 open orders clear, cancel, or map to explicit owners without creating unprotected positions.
Whether live_gate_conformance returns to OK with route_lock_enforce and permission enforcement clearly represented.
Whether fill and exit reconciliation sources refresh during RTH and align with broker orders, execution truth, and panel score.
Whether actual realized P/L and R-based forward summaries agree after all open/pending candidates settle.
Whether fully checked gap/options agreement candidates outperform missing/stale-map candidates after actual fills and exits.
Whether Mustard X fresh deep-stack and lone-parent runner samples produce realized runner R after slippage, partials, and trailing exits.
Whether no-parent-lineage and track-only labels are cleanly excluded from live-edge conclusions.
Whether daily certification gives explicit blocked reasons if it remains rejected.

operator_read: This packet is a containment and evidence-integrity review, not a reason to tune live trading. Daily certification is REJECTED/FAIL; contract health and live gate conformance are FAIL; the account is flat on positions but has 3 open orders;
